steps.note: Edge cases: login disclosure expanded, setup wizard, /storage page, 500-style error
Disclosure body should now be visible (.env / install.sh).
Click camera-tile that's DISABLED (garage) — link should still work but live modal will get 502.
Dismiss any modal, navigate to /storage to make sure the storage caption link works.
Hit a 502-style URL to verify error page renders for non-404.
